title: Chrome > Settings > Sync > Open Tabs = ON
content:
Chrome > Settings > Sync > Open Tabs = ON
2. On desktop Chrome:
Go to chrome://history/syncedTabs
View open tabs from iOS and manually export.

Chrome does not support batch export of open tabs directly. Use extensions like OneTab or copy-paste URLs manually.

⸻

[AA03] COMBINED AUTOMATION (Optional)

iOS Shortcuts (Manual Build Needed)

You can use Shortcuts app to:
• Loop through Safari tab URLs
• Append them to a note or export as text

Example logic:

Repeat with each Safari tab:
Get Tab URL
Add to text block
Save as file or share
